profile: QA Test Engineer with over 5 years of experience in end-to-end test automation, API testing, and quality assurance for enterprise SaaS and AI-powered products. Built and maintained automated test suites across 8+ production applications, achieving strong code coverage and catching the majority of bugs before production release. Designed CI/CD-integrated test pipelines using Cypress, Playwright, and Pytest that significantly reduced regression testing time. Implemented load testing frameworks to identify performance bottlenecks and validate system behavior under stress. Developed LLM output validation frameworks for ensuring AI response quality across customer-facing applications. Reduced production defect escape rate through shift-left testing practices and automated quality gates.

projects.name: ID Area – Identity Verification
projects.description: Automated KYC platform handling document scanning, OCR, face matching, liveness detection, and fingerprint verification.
features: Designed and executed comprehensive test suites for document scanning accuracy and OCR extraction validation
Built automated testing pipelines for face matching and liveness detection with edge case coverage
Implemented biometric verification test frameworks for fingerprint matching accuracy and false-positive rates
Created regression test suites ensuring KYC compliance workflows meet regulatory accuracy thresholds

projects.name: CASPer Edge – AI Interview Preparation
projects.description: AI-driven CASPer exam preparation platform that evaluates student responses against scenarios designed by Stanford & Harvard-trained doctors.
features: Built end-to-end test automation for the AI evaluation engine validating scoring accuracy against expert benchmarks
Designed test frameworks for LLM output validation ensuring consistent and unbiased response evaluations
Implemented load testing for concurrent student sessions to verify platform stability under peak usage
Created UAT test plans with scenario coverage for all exam question types and edge cases

projects.name: Talent Search – Natural Language Enterprise Search
projects.description: Recruiter tool enabling natural language queries against indexed talent databases for intelligent candidate matching.
features: Built API test suites for search query accuracy, relevance ranking, and filter combination coverage
Designed performance test benchmarks for search response times under varying data volumes
Implemented automated regression testing for document processing and indexing pipeline reliability
Created data-driven test frameworks for validating NLP query interpretation across diverse input patterns
